title: Database migration error due to missing column
symptom: During the database migration process, n8n throws an error indicating that a specific column does not exist, causing the application to exit unexpectedly.
applies_when: Upgrading n8n to a new version
root_cause: The error occurs when the database schema is not aligned with the expected structure after an upgrade. This can happen if certain API credentials are not properly configured or if there are remnants of old schema elements that conflict with the new version.
fix_steps: Locate and delete the 'n8n account' API credential
agent_instruction: Delete the 'n8n account' API credential and retry the migration.
